headline: How The L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Investment Story Is Evolving With Recent Developments
summary: L3Harris Technologies enters this update cycle with no changes to its published price targets, leaving current analyst expectations intact for now. As the story around the stock continues to evolve through earnings, contracts, and sector moves, the key question is how you can track and interpret these shifts before they show up in formal estimates. Read on to see how to stay on top of the narrative as new data and research come through, so you can follow the stock with more...

headline: L3Harris Expansion And Airbus Tie Up Shape Valuation Opportunity
summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) is expanding its Huntsville manufacturing operations, with plans to significantly increase capacity and add new jobs. The company is investing materially in new production facilities aimed at supporting growing demand for munitions and related defense systems. L3Harris has also signed a new collaboration agreement with Airbus Helicopters to pursue future Canadian defence opportunities. The partnership focuses on integrating L3Harris imaging and reconnaissance...
